title: Lead Instructional Designer at Manya Group

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Manya Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the Manya Group family as a Instructional Designer in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Manya Group:
Manya Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manya Group!
